title: Analytics - Logout Initiated
scenario: Verify that after a user logs out, the Firebase dashboard for the Logout Initiated event displays default elements and updates event counts after a few hours.
steps: Open the Logout Initiated Firebase page – verify the page opens properly and contains default elements: graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment, screen name, user type, and action.
Log out of your account on mobile.
Wait for a few hours for event counts to update.
Check the Firebase dashboard page for the Logout Initiated event – verify that the event count for related elements has increased.
expected: The Logout Initiated Firebase page displays all default elements (graph, events in last 30 minutes, event count by country, event count by gender, events per session, app version, app build, app environment, screen name, user type, and action). After logging out and waiting a few hours, the event count for related elements increases.
